name: Beachside Jiujitsu
blurb: Clean, no-nonsense gym site for a BJJ club in Hove, SA.

detail.business: Beachside Jiujitsu is a Brazilian jiu-jitsu gym in Hove, South Australia. They needed a site that matched the discipline and directness of the sport - no fluff, just clear info and a strong first impression.
detail.built: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel. The design keeps things bold and dark with fast load times and a mobile-first layout so new members can find class times and get in touch on any device.
detail.notable: The whole site was designed and built from scratch with zero templates. Every section is purpose-built to convert gym-curious visitors into members who show up to class.
